Petition To Confirm Assets Of Trust And For Order Transferring Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Confirm Assets Of Trust And For Order Transferring Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Continued To Jan-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Assets Of Trust And For Order Transferring Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Petition To Confirm Assets Of Trust And For Order Transferring Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Continued To Nov-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La, via ZOOM, for Laurent Martini and Stephanie Martini, Co-Trustees.

The court begins by advising Ms. La that the court did not receive bank statements from immediately prior to settlor's date of death. Ms. La reports that those statements were not attached to the petition. The court then confirms with Ms. La that the LLC operating agreement has not been submitted. The court then points to its concern regarding notice to the bank and LLC which were not addressed to a specific person acting as agent for process of service. The court instructs Ms. La to provide notice to the agent for process of service registered in California for both the bank and LLC. Ms. La is also instructed to file the bank statements and LLC operating agreement referenced above no later than Nov-02-2021.

The Petition to Confirm Assets of Trust, etc., is continued to Nov-16-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.

Petition To Confirm Assets Of Trust And For Order Transferring Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Sep-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
